title: task
description:
Implement EDHOC (RFC 9528) key establishment for deriving OSCORE security contexts between peers.

EDHOC protocol (from spec section 8.8):
- 3-message handshake (~200 bytes total)
- Uses Ed25519 keys from link layer (derive X25519 for DH)
- Cipher suite 0: AES-CCM-16-64-128 + SHA-256 + X25519 + Ed25519
- Export OSCORE master secret and salt via edhoc_exporter()

Implementation components:
1. EDHOC initiator state machine
2. EDHOC responder state machine
3. Message transport over CoAP (POST to /.well-known/edhoc)
4. Key derivation: Ed25519 seed -> X25519 keypair
5. Context export: prk_out -> OSCORE master_secret + master_salt

Use uoscore-uedhoc library (modules/lib/uoscore-uedhoc/):
- edhoc_initiator_run() / edhoc_responder_run()
- prk_out2exporter() + edhoc_exporter()

Trigger conditions (from spec 8.8):
- Lazy: on first OSCORE-protected request to a peer without context
- Explicit: POST to /.well-known/edhoc
- Periodic: re-run every 24 hours or on SSN exhaustion

Parent: project-LICHEN-r6fu.2
close_reason:
Implemented EDHOC CoAP transport integration:

1. Added EdhocResource class for /.well-known/edhoc endpoint (responder role):
   - Handles POST requests for EDHOC Message 1 and Message 3
   - Stores derived OSCORE contexts in context store
   - Supports session tracking per peer

2. Completed SecureDatagramChannel EDHOC initiator support:
   - Implemented _edhoc_exchange() for CoAP POST to /.well-known/edhoc
   - Implemented _edhoc_send() for final message delivery
   - Added _EdhocChannel for bypassing OSCORE during handshake
   - Added local_host and edhoc_timeout parameters

3. Added lazy EDHOC establishment:
   - Tracks active EDHOC peers to allow plaintext responses
   - Context automatically established on first send to unknown peer

4. Updated build_site() to accept optional edhoc_resource parameter

5. Added comprehensive tests in test_edhoc_transport.py:
   - test_edhoc_resource_creation
   - test_edhoc_handshake_via_coap
   - test_edhoc_resource_rejects_empty_payload
   - test_derived_contexts_have_matching_keys

Files modified:
- python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py (EdhocResource class)
- python/src/lichen/coap/secure.py (EDHOC transport methods)
- python/src/lichen/coap/__init__.py (exports)
- python/tests/coap/test_edhoc_transport.py (new tests)
